name: terrashark
desc: Terraform Skill for Claude Code and Codex. LLMs hallucinate a lot with Terraform - TerraShark fixes this. It eliminates hallucinations, is designed for modular…
descFull: Terraform Skill for Claude Code and Codex. LLMs hallucinate a lot with Terraform - TerraShark fixes this. It eliminates hallucinations, is designed for modular and secure code and grounds your IaC in the official Hashicorp Terraform best practices.
